caption: The video takes place in a large, open hall at the Javits Center in New York, NY, where two men are seated for an interview. The man on the left wears a dark blue suit and glasses, while the man on the right wears a black suit over a light-colored shirt. They sit at a small table holding a laptop and several papers. The man on the left speaks and gestures with his hands throughout the sequence, while the man on the right listens attentively. In the background, other attendees walk through the spacious venue. A graphic overlay at the bottom of the screen reads "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY", and "Sponsored By MongoDB" alongside the MongoDB logo. The scene remains static in terms of composition, with the only movement being the conversational gestures of the man on the left.
